text:
In late 2024 "Agentforce" was announced. I said "hype." Then numbers came.

Agentforce: AI agents on the Salesforce platform. Customer service, sales assistant, marketing automation.

The key difference: Salesforce owns the data. 100M+ enterprise customer records in CRM.
name: AIStockEdge

text: Salesforce Agent Fabric Context Catalog Goes GA — First Unified Governance for Agents + Data Salesforce integrated Agent Fabric with Informatica's Cloud Data Governance & Catalog to create Agent Fabric Context Catalog — a unified governance control plane for AI services and data
